title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi is a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara. The company endured four years of regulatory battles and successfully sued a government agency before achieving a $22 billion valuation and scaling to millions of users.
